{{CargoRelic
|name=V8 Engine
|class_id=22195
|rank=AAA
|affct=TECH
|birthday=07-12
|source=
|description=On Jul 12, 1923 AD, the world's first V8 engine was manufactured.<br>The classic cylinder arrangement of an internal combustion engine and also the most common engine structure in high-end cars. Due to its superior ignition and vibration characteristics, a number of its derivatives have been developed for high-end competitions.
|fame=43
|art=28
|fth=48
|civ=39
|tech=70
|ss1=Quantum Amp production +1.2%<br>Per 5 Quantum Amp LVLs, Snail ATK +8<br>Quantum Amp LVL: 50/50
|ss2=Quantum Amp production +1.6%<br>Per 5 Quantum Amp LVLs, Snail ATK +12<br>Quantum Amp LVL: 50/50
|ss3=Quantum Amp production +2%<br>Per 5 Quantum Amp LVLs, Snail ATK +16<br>Quantum Amp LVL: 50/50
|ss4=Quantum Amp production +2.8%<br>Per 5 Quantum Amp LVLs, Snail ATK +24<br>Quantum Amp LVL: 50/50
|ss5=Quantum Amp production +3.6%<br>Per 5 Quantum Amp LVLs, Snail ATK +32<br>Quantum Amp LVL: 50/50
|ss7=Quantum Amp production +3.6%<br>Per 5 Quantum Amp LVLs, Snail ATK +32<br>Quantum Amp LVL: 50/50<br>Quantum Amp production +2.8% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Minion Sim Skill II.png|50px]]Place in Minion Sims: This Relic's TECH +10
|skill2=[[File:Minion Sim Skill II.png|50px]]Place in Minion Sims: In Minion Sims, Troop HP Regen +600
}}
